zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Drummond於1390年出生在蘇格蘭斯林史爾音賀馬米時，她的父親Sir Malcolm Drummond -Earl Of Mar43歲，母親Lady Isabell Douglas Countess of Mar30歲。她於1361年與9th Chief Allan MacOchtery de Cameron of Clan Cameron在蘇格蘭阿吉爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1445年在她的家鄉享年55歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭斯林史爾音賀馬米。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel Drummond于1390年出生在苏格兰斯林史爾音賀馬米时，她的父亲Sir Malcolm Drummond -Earl Of Mar43岁，母亲Lady Isabell Douglas Countess of Mar30岁。她于1361年与9th Chief Allan MacOchtery de Cameron of Clan Cameron在苏格兰阿吉爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1445年在她的家乡享年55岁，埋葬在苏格兰斯林史爾音賀馬米。

nameMeanings.name: Drummond
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of various places, notably the barony of Drummond, which is probably identical with the parish of Drymen (Stirlingshire), named from Gaelic drumainn, a derivative of druim ‘ridge’. It has been said that the principal family of this name are descended from a Hungarian nobleman, Maurice, who accompanied Edgar Atheling and his sister Margaret to Scotland in 1068, where she married King Malcolm III. However, there is disagreement on whether or not this was the case.

English: occasionally perhaps from an unrecorded Middle English personal name Dromund (Old Norse Drómundr, apparently from a word denoting a kind of Byzantine galley prevalent till the 12th cent., from Greek dromōn ‘runner’).

variants.name: Drummonds
meanings: Scottish: variant of Drummond , with post-medieval excrescent -s. In Britain this surname is found mainly in County Durham.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Drummond was born in 1390, in Inchmahome, Stirlingshire, Scotland, her father, Sir Malcolm Drummond -Earl Of Mar, was 43 and her mother, Lady Isabell Douglas Countess of Mar, was 30. She married 9th Chief Allan MacOchtery de Cameron of Clan Cameron in 1361, in Argyll, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1445, in her hometown, at the age of 55, and was buried in Inchmahome, Stirlingshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Drummond est née en 1390, à Inchmahome, Stirlingshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Malcolm Drummond -Earl Of Mar, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Lady Isabell Douglas Countess of Mar, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé 9th Chief Allan MacOchtery de Cameron of Clan Cameron en 1361, à Argyll, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1445, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterrée à Inchmahome, Stirlingshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel Drummond 1390 in Inchmahome, Stirlingshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Malcolm Drummond -Earl Of Mar 43 und ihre Mutter Lady Isabell Douglas Countess of Mar 30. Sie hat 1361 in Argyll, Scotland 9th Chief Allan MacOchtery de Cameron of Clan Cameron geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1445 im Alter von 55 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Inchmahome, Stirlingshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Drummond è nata il nel 1390 nel Inchmahome, Stirlingshire, Scotland, sua padre, Sir Malcolm Drummond -Earl Of Mar, aveva 43 anni e sua madre, Lady Isabell Douglas Countess of Mar, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato 9th Chief Allan MacOchtery de Cameron of Clan Cameron nel 1361, nel Argyll, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1445, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolta a Inchmahome, Stirlingshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Drummondが1390年にスコットランドスティルリングシュアイアインチマーhオメで生まれた時，父Sir Malcolm Drummond -Earl Of Marは43歳，母Lady Isabell Douglas Countess of Marは30歳であった。1361年にスコットランドアルグイルで9th Chief Allan MacOchtery de Cameron of Clan Cameronと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1445年に故郷で55歳で死去し，スコットランドスティルリングシュアイアインチマーhオメにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Drummond(이)가 1390년 스컷랜드 스티를링실르 인ch마홈에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Malcolm Drummond -Earl Of Mar(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Isabell Douglas Countess of Mar(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1361년 스컷랜드 아그이에서 9th Chief Allan MacOchtery de Cameron of Clan Cameron(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1445년 그녀의 고향에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 스티를링실르 인ch마홈에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Drummond nasceu em 1390, em Inchmahome, Stirlingshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Malcolm Drummond -Earl Of Mar, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Lady Isabell Douglas Countess of Mar, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com 9th Chief Allan MacOchtery de Cameron of Clan Cameron em 1361, em Argyll, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1445, em sua cidade natal, com 55 anos, e foi sepultada em Inchmahome, Stirlingshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Drummond родилась в 1390 г. в местности инчмахом, стирлингшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir Malcolm Drummond -Earl Of Mar было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Isabell Douglas Countess of Mar, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени 9th Chief Allan MacOchtery de Cameron of Clan Cameron в 1361 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1445 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 55 лет и была похоронена в местности инчмахом, стирлингшир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel Drummond nació en 1390, en Inchmahome, Stirlingshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir Malcolm Drummond -Earl Of Mar, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Lady Isabell Douglas Countess of Mar, tenía 30 años. Se casó con 9th Chief Allan MacOchtery de Cameron of Clan Cameron en 1361, en Argyll, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1445, en su pueblo, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultada en Inchmahome, Stirlingshire, Scotland.
